patch_type: Operational executive control pane over V57.1 board narrative and V57 proof layer
release_chain_status: V58 is the current implemented build. It loads after V57.1 in src/ui/v52-7-operational-layer.js. It consolidates the executive inspection surface across TrustMap, Runtime, Evidence, Proof Pack, score contract, Trust Scoring Models, evidence gaps, decision records, board narrative, and next actions without adding a new top-level tab. GitHub Pages browser QA is required after deploy.
top_level_tab_rule: Do not add more top-level tabs. Upgrade existing workspaces only.
version_label_rule: Build and version labels belong in Settings/admin metadata and repo documentation only. They must not appear as executive-facing dashboard content.
public_naming_rule: Public product name is CyberShield Executive OS. Current prototype build is V58. Do not call the public build CyberShield OS v8 unless the repo, README, loader, Settings/admin metadata, and public UX intentionally move to that version scheme.
controlling_doctrine: No score without a model. No model without evidence. No evidence without traceability. No action without consequence.
v58_changes: adds Operational Trust Control Pane into Briefing
adds Operational Trust Control Pane into Runtime
adds control cards for Decision Required, Evidence Gaps, Model Trace, and Proof Ready
adds route buttons to Runtime, Evidence, Architecture, and Proof Pack
preserves V57.1 Board and Executive Narrative Layer
preserves V56.4 Core Trust Scoring Models
preserves V56.3 Universal Score Object and Score Band Contract
preserves V56.1 Evidence and Assumption Register

operational_trust_control_pane.boundary: Static advisory prototype only. No live monitoring, live evidence retrieval, live scoring, live integrations, live enforcement, report delivery, ticketing, or workflow automation.

internet_trust_engine_future_track.sequence_note: V58 consolidates the executive inspection pane needed before future Internet Trust Engine work, but does not implement live artifact analysis, live scoring, claim extraction, evidence retrieval, or internet verification.

recommended_next_build.label: V58.1 Runtime Action Queue
goals: convert control pane findings into prioritized executive action queue
show owner, evidence gap, runtime action, recommended next move, and proof-ready status
do this without adding a new top-level tab

prototype_boundary: The current GitHub Pages build is a lightweight static advisory prototype. It is not connected to live enterprise telemetry, SIEM, EDR, IAM, Microsoft 365, cloud control planes, GRC tooling, production agent enforcement, Google Sheets, CRM sync, ticketing, notifications, marketplace systems, ad platforms, domain-intelligence systems, identity verification systems, CMMC certification systems, healthcare compliance validation systems, banking/payment systems, live monitoring, live evidence retrieval, live scoring, live claim extraction, internet claim verification, report delivery, ticketing, workflow automation, or takedown automation.
known_limitations: Operational Trust Control Pane uses static prototype and loaded in-browser registry data
Control pane does not perform live monitoring
Control pane does not retrieve live evidence
Control pane does not perform live scoring
Control pane does not create tickets, send reports, or trigger workflows
Control pane download is a text file, not a branded PDF or board deck
Internet Trust Engine is documented as a future requirement track but is not yet implemented
GitHub Pages browser QA required after deploy
